mnemonics: BANACH: Bring A Non-empty, Absolutely Complete space, Contract to Help find a fixed point
keyPoints: A contraction mapping has a Lipschitz constant less than 1
The fixed point is unique in the complete metric space
Iterative application of the contraction leads to convergence
commonMistakes: Assuming the space is complete when it may not be
Forgetting to verify the contraction condition (Lipschitz constant < 1)
Applying to non-empty spaces without checking completeness
